title: coelogyne arachnites
intro: Coelogyne arachnites, also known as the spider orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne arachnites include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
